hero.title: Karim Boudabous
hero.subtitle: Sports Science & Elite Performance
hero.tagline: Training smarter. Performing better. Living stronger.

academic.title: Academic Foundation
academic.body: I hold a Bachelor's degree in Sport Sciences & Physical Activity from UCAM (Universidad Católica San Antonio de Murcia) and am currently pursuing a Master's degree in High Performance Sport: Strength & Conditioning at the same institution. My academic training spans exercise physiology, biomechanics, sports nutrition, psychology, data analysis, and training methodology.

coaching.title: Coaching Philosophy
coaching.body: As a Football Coach (UEFA C), I believe elite performance is built on tactical intelligence, physical conditioning, and mental resilience. My methodology integrates sports science principles directly into training design — every drill has a purpose, every session has a measurable outcome. I apply long-term athlete development principles at every stage.

vision.title: Professional Vision
vision.body: My goal is to grow as a strength and conditioning coach, football coach, and personal trainer — applying evidence-based methods to help athletes and individuals reach their full potential. As a NSCA CSCS® certified coach and Barça Innovation Hub trained professional, I am motivated to contribute to football clubs, performance centers, and fitness environments where long-term development and excellence go hand in hand.

items.title: Personal Training
items.description: Individualized training programs designed to improve strength, conditioning, and overall health. Emphasis on safe exercise execution, progressive load management, and sustainable fitness habits for long-term results.

items.title: Football Coaching
items.description: Football Coach (UEFA C) methodology applied to youth and team development. Technical, tactical, and physical training fully integrated, with a strong focus on long-term athlete development and player-centered coaching.

items.title: Strength & Conditioning
items.description: NSCA CSCS® certified S&C programs focused on age-appropriate conditioning, injury prevention, load management, and athletic development — aligned with training and match demands.

items.company: El Palmar CF — Estrella Grana · Master's Internship
items.description: Master's internship as S&C Coach at a football club, collaborating in the planning and application of training programs, load monitoring, injury prevention, and performance improvement. Working closely with the technical staff on physical preparation for training sessions and competition.

Design and execution of personalized training programs focused on strength, physical conditioning, and performance improvement. Client progress monitoring, load control, and application of evidence-based training principles for health and sport performance.

Technical support in youth football within the UEFA C coaching certification framework. Participated in training session planning, match preparation, and implementation of technical-tactical objectives. Collaborated with the coaching staff in the integral development of players and the organization of training sessions.

First supervised university internship supporting the physical development of youth football players across multiple age categories. Responsibilities included age-appropriate conditioning sessions, monitoring physical performance, load management principles, and injury prevention. Collaborated closely with technical staff to align physical preparation with training and match demands.

Hands-on coaching experience in one of Tunisia's leading football academies. Supported youth training programs through technical drills, physical preparation, and tactical instruction. Assisted head coaches in developing players' technical skills and match awareness within a top-tier club environment.

Former competitive footballer and team captain with experience in federated competition. Developed leadership skills, teamwork, and tactical understanding of football through structured training and official competitions.

items.degree: Master's Degree — High Performance Sport: Strength & Conditioning
items.institution: UCAM Universidad Católica San Antonio de Murcia
items.description: Specialization in strength training, injury prevention, recovery strategies, load management, and holistic performance development for elite athletes.

items.degree: Strength Training: From Rehabilitation to Performance
items.description: Advanced training course covering the continuum from injury rehabilitation to elite athletic performance, integrating strength training principles, movement quality, and evidence-based methodology used by FC Barcelona's performance staff.

items.degree: NSCA CSCS® — Certified Strength & Conditioning Specialist
items.description: Internationally recognized certification in strength and conditioning, covering exercise science, program design, testing and evaluation, and organization and administration for athletic performance.
Internationally recognized football coaching qualification covering UEFA methodology, session planning, youth player development, long-term athlete development, and match analysis.

items.degree: Bachelor's Degree — Sport Sciences & Physical Activity
items.institution: UCAM Universidad Católica San Antonio de Murcia
items.description: Comprehensive foundation in human anatomy, exercise physiology, sports nutrition, training methodology, data analysis, psychology in sport, and physical activity & health.
Graduated with a grade of 95%, with a strong focus on mathematics, physics, and scientific reasoning.
